assertions.description: ProcessingInstruction nodes use nodeType 7, the DOM node type used for patching markers.
<template for> can carry the target range name used by declarative patches.
The showcase live route serves a no-store text/html document containing processing-instruction ranges and template patches.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const res=await fetch('/v150/out-of-order-streaming/chunk-ordering/live?delay=400&run=conformance',{cache:'no-store'});const type=res.headers.get('content-type')||'';const cache=res.headers.get('cache-control')||'';const text=await res.text();return res.ok&&type.startsWith('text/html')&&cache.includes('no-store')&&text.includes('<?start name="hero"')&&text.includes('<template for="hero">')&&text.includes('<?marker name="results"');})()

assertions.description: Every out-of-order streaming concept exposes a live streamed route with literal template-for patches.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const concepts=['streaming-demo','chunk-ordering','chunk-timing-chart','chunk-visualizer','pipeline-demo','ai-chat-simulation'];const checks=await Promise.all(concepts.map(async(concept)=>{const res=await fetch(`/v150/out-of-order-streaming/${concept}/live?delay=300&run=conformance`,{cache:'no-store'});const text=await res.text();return res.ok&&(res.headers.get('content-type')||'').startsWith('text/html')&&text.includes('<template for=')&&text.includes('<?start name=');}));return checks.every(Boolean);})()

assertions.description: A streamed chunk-ordering document applies template patches natively, leaving patched content and no unapplied template-for elements.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const iframe=document.createElement('iframe');iframe.hidden=true;iframe.src='/v150/out-of-order-streaming/chunk-ordering/live?delay=350&run=conformance-frame';document.body.appendChild(iframe);try{await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const timer=setTimeout(()=>reject(new Error('iframe timed out')),5000);iframe.addEventListener('load',()=>{clearTimeout(timer);resolve();},{once:true});});const doc=iframe.contentDocument;return !!doc&&doc.querySelectorAll('template[for]').length===0&&doc.querySelectorAll('[data-placeholder]').length===0&&doc.body.textContent.includes('Hero patched')&&doc.body.textContent.includes('Result 2 patched');}catch(_){return false;}finally{iframe.remove();}})()

assertions.description: Repeated template patches that include a fresh marker append multiple AI token spans to the same range.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const iframe=document.createElement('iframe');iframe.hidden=true;iframe.src='/v150/out-of-order-streaming/ai-chat-simulation/live?delay=300&token=4&run=conformance-frame';document.body.appendChild(iframe);try{await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const timer=setTimeout(()=>reject(new Error('iframe timed out')),5000);iframe.addEventListener('load',()=>{clearTimeout(timer);resolve();},{once:true});});const doc=iframe.contentDocument;return !!doc&&doc.querySelectorAll('template[for]').length===0&&doc.querySelectorAll('.token').length>=8&&doc.body.textContent.includes('Out-of-order HTML patching');}catch(_){return false;}finally{iframe.remove();}})()
